channel.title: Joseph's Working Notes (EN)
channel.description: Field notes on AI workflows, automation, documents, and technical operations.

item.title: When Two AI Models Agreed—and Were Still Wrong
item.description: A washer-program image-reading case in which cross-review converged on the same wrong answer, until the user-established Ground Truth corrected it.

item.title: The `rg` We Didn't Check
item.description: A short engineering investigation into a recurring Codex rg security popup, and the moment the question changed.

item.title: Codex usage felt off, then soonsoon checked the processes
item.description: A note on soonsoon’s practical look at Codex Computer Use background activity and usage drain.
